'''Armor Droids''' were small flying [[Droid/Legends|droids]] found in the [[Ugnaught/Legends|Ugnaught]] sublevels of [[Cloud City/Legends|Cloud City]]. They had nigh-impregnable outer armor. However, said armor was expanded outward when the droids are about to fire their pulse cannons, making them vulnerable temporarily as a result.<ref name="SEMP" />

==Appearances==
*''[[Super Star Wars: The Empire Strikes Back]]'' {{1st}}
